name: Shenzhou 23
location_str: Launch Area 91 (SLS-1 / 921) @ Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center, CHN
description: Shenzhou 23 will be the 23rd flight of the Shenzhou program.
program_description: The Shenzhou program is a crewed spaceflight initiative by China. The program put the first Chinese citizen, Yang Liwei, into orbit on 15 October 2003.
rocket_fact: Launch pad water deluge systems are primarily used for sound suppression to prevent acoustic waves from tearing the rocket apart.
